title: FLOSS Weekly 316: ccMixter
summary:
Emily Richards is the CEO of ArtisTech, the small company that operates ccMixter.org and dig.ccMixter.org.
dig.ccmixter is where people come to find fantastic, liberally licensed music. The musicians' community at ccMixter make modern, challenging, but satisfying music that they want you to hear!
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
